Bash(../venv/Scripts/python -c " from app.database import SessionLocal from app.models.business_profile_model import BusinessProfile db = SessionLocal\(\) for p in db.query\(BusinessProfile\).all\(\): print\(p.id, p.name\) db.close\(\) ")

Bash(../venv/Scripts/python -c " from app.database import SessionLocal from app.models.company_model import Company from app.models.business_profile_model import BusinessProfile db = SessionLocal\(\) companies = db.query\(Company\).all\(\) profiles = {p.id: p.name for p in db.query\(BusinessProfile\).all\(\)} for c in companies[:15]: print\(f'ID:{c.id_company} | {c.name[:30]:30s} | perfil_id:{c.business_profile_id} | perfil:{profiles.get\(c.business_profile_id,\\"sin perfil\\"\)}'\) db.close\(\) ")

Bash(../venv/Scripts/python -c " from app.database import SessionLocal from app.models.company_plan_model import CompanyPlan db = SessionLocal\(\) count = db.query\(CompanyPlan\).count\(\) print\('Registros en company_plans:', count\) db.close\(\) ")

Bash(../venv/Scripts/python -c " from app.database import SessionLocal, Base, engine from app.models import CompanyPlan, Plan, Company Base.metadata.create_all\(bind=engine, checkfirst=True\) db = SessionLocal\(\) free_plan = db.query\(Plan\).filter\(Plan.name == 'Free'\).first\(\) print\('Plan Free ID:', free_plan.id if free_plan else 'NO EXISTE'\) companies = db.query\(Company\).all\(\) for c in companies: exists = db.query\(CompanyPlan\).filter\(CompanyPlan.company_id == c.id_company, CompanyPlan.is_active == True\).first\(\) if not exists: cp = CompanyPlan\(company_id=c.id_company, plan_id=free_plan.id, expiration_date=None, is_active=True\) db.add\(cp\) db.commit\(\) total = db.query\(CompanyPlan\).count\(\) print\('Total registros company_plans:', total\) db.close\(\) ")

Bash(../venv/Scripts/python -c " import sys sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\) from app.database import SessionLocal, Base, engine from app.models.company_plan_model import CompanyPlan from app.models.plan_model import Plan from app.models.company_model import Company Base.metadata.create_all\(bind=engine, checkfirst=True\) db = SessionLocal\(\) free = db.query\(Plan\).filter\(Plan.name == 'Free'\).first\(\) comps = db.query\(Company\).all\(\) added = 0 for c in comps: ex = db.query\(CompanyPlan\).filter_by\(company_id=c.id_company, is_active=True\).first\(\) if not ex and free: db.add\(CompanyPlan\(company_id=c.id_company, plan_id=free.id\)\) added += 1 db.commit\(\) print\(f'Added={added}, Total={db.query\(CompanyPlan\).count\(\)}'\) db.close\(\) ")
